name: Serena
description: A free web-based platform providing psychological support for students, accessible online through digital tools and professional guidance.

name: Smart Board
description: A Single Page Application (SPA) for creating, filtering, and persisting notes and reminders using Web Storage, featuring auxiliary window support and dynamic DOM manipulation.

name: Project repository
